top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 AND fd.language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 AND f.language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 AND fd.language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 AND f.language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 AND fd.language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 AND fd.language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 AND f.language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 AND f.language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 AND fd.language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid;
